sentences.target: Je pense à ma liste de courses.
sentences.reading: /ʒə pɑ̃s a ma list də kuʁs/

translations.fr: Je pense à ma liste de courses.
translations.ipa: /ʒə pɑ̃s a ma list də kuʁs/
translations.en: I’m thinking about my shopping list.
translations.es: Estoy pensando en mi lista de compras.
translations.it: Sto pensando alla mia lista della spesa.
translations.yue: 我喺度諗緊我嘅購物清單。
translations.ru: Я думаю о своём списке покупок.
translations.pt: Estou pensando na minha lista de compras.
translations.he: אני חושב על רשימת הקניות שלי.
translations.vi: Tôi đang nghĩ về danh sách mua sắm của mình.
translations.ar: أفكر في قائمة التسوق الخاصة بي.
translations.uk: Я думаю про свій список покупок.
translations.hi: मैं अपनी खरीदारी की सूची के बारे में सोच रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Σκέφτομαι τη λίστα με τα ψώνια μου.
translations.id: Saya sedang memikirkan daftar belanja saya.
translations.ro: Mă gândesc la lista mea de cumpărături.
translations.ja: 買い物リストのことを考えています。

tokens.explanation: 1st-person singular subject pronoun; subject of the verb 'pense'.
Main verb, present indicative (1st person singular); selects a prepositional complement with 'à'.
Preposition governed by 'penser' introducing its oblique complement.
Possessive determiner, feminine singular; agrees with 'liste'.
Common noun, head of the noun phrase 'ma liste'.
Preposition linking the head noun 'liste' to its nominal complement.
Common noun (plural); complement of 'liste' introduced by 'de'.

sentences.target: Tu dois penser à prendre un manteau.

translations.fr: Tu dois penser à prendre un manteau.
translations.en: You have to think about taking a coat.
translations.es: Tienes que acordarte de llevar un abrigo.
translations.de: Du musst daran denken, einen Mantel mitzunehmen.
translations.it: Devi ricordarti di prendere un cappotto.
translations.ru: Тебе нужно не забыть взять пальто.
translations.pt: Você tem que lembrar de levar um casaco.
translations.vi: Bạn phải nhớ mang theo một chiếc áo khoác.
translations.ar: عليك أن تتذكر أن تأخذ معطف.
translations.nl: Je moet eraan denken om een jas mee te nemen.
translations.uk: Ти маєш не забути взяти пальто.
translations.hi: तुम्हें एक कोट ले जाना याद रखना चाहिए.
translations.el: Πρέπει να θυμηθείς να πάρεις ένα παλτό.
translations.nb: Du må huske å ta med en jakke.
translations.id: Kamu harus ingat untuk membawa jaket.
translations.sv: Du måste komma ihåg att ta med en jacka.
translations.ro: Trebuie să îți amintești să iei un palton.
translations.cs: Musíš myslet na to, abys si vzal kabát.
translations.da: Du skal huske at tage en frakke med.
translations.fi: Sinun pitää muistaa ottaa takki mukaan.
translations.ja: コートを持っていくのを忘れないで。

tokens.explanation: 2nd-person singular subject pronoun; subject of 'dois'.
Main/modal verb, present indicative (2nd person singular); takes the infinitive 'penser' as its complement.
Infinitive verb complement of 'dois'; governs a prepositional infinitival complement with 'à'.
Preposition introducing the infinitival complement 'prendre' selected by 'penser à'.
Infinitive verb; complement of the preposition 'à' (within the 'penser à' construction).
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'manteau'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of the infinitive 'prendre'.

sentences.target: On pense à réserver une table.

translations.fr: On pense à réserver une table.
translations.en: We’re thinking about booking a table.
translations.es: Estamos pensando en reservar una mesa.
translations.de: Wir überlegen, einen Tisch zu reservieren.
translations.it: Stiamo pensando di prenotare un tavolo.
translations.pt: Estamos pensando em reservar uma mesa.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang tính đặt bàn.
translations.nl: We denken eraan een tafel te reserveren.
translations.hu: Azon gondolkodunk, hogy foglaljunk egy asztalt.
translations.hi: हम मेज़ बुक करने के बारे में सोच रहे हैं.
translations.nb: Vi tenker på å bestille bord.
translations.id: Kami sedang berpikir untuk memesan meja.
translations.sv: Vi funderar på att boka bord.
translations.ro: Ne gândim să rezervăm o masă.
translations.da: Vi overvejer at bestille et bord.
translations.ja: テーブルを予約しようか考えています。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite/impersonal subject pronoun; commonly used for colloquial 'we'.
Main verb, present indicative (3rd person singular with 'on'); selects a prepositional complement with 'à'.
Preposition introducing the infinitival complement 'réserver' selected by 'penser à'.
Infinitive verb; complement of 'à' (in the 'penser à + infinitif' construction).
Indefinite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'table'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'réserver'.

sentences.target: Vous pensez trop à ce message.

translations.fr: Vous pensez trop à ce message.
translations.en: You think too much about that message.
translations.es: Estás pensando demasiado en ese mensaje.
translations.de: Du denkst zu viel über diese Nachricht nach.
translations.it: Stai pensando troppo a quel messaggio.
translations.ko: 그 메시지에 대해 너무 많이 생각하고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 你对那条消息想得太多了。
translations.yue: 你對嗰個訊息諗得太多。
translations.ru: Ты слишком много думаешь об этом сообщении.
translations.pt: Você está pensando demais naquela mensagem.
translations.he: אתה חושב יותר מדי על ההודעה הזאת.
translations.tr: O mesaj hakkında çok fazla düşünüyorsun.
translations.vi: Bạn đang nghĩ quá nhiều về tin nhắn đó.
translations.ar: أنت تفكر كثيرًا في تلك الرسالة.
translations.nl: Je denkt te veel aan dat bericht.
translations.uk: Ти надто багато думаєш про те повідомлення.
translations.hu: Túl sokat gondolkodsz azon az üzeneten.
translations.hi: तुम उस संदेश के बारे में बहुत ज़्यादा सोच रहे हो.
translations.pl: Za dużo myślisz o tej wiadomości.
translations.nb: Du tenker altfor mye på den meldingen.
translations.id: Kamu terlalu banyak memikirkan pesan itu.
translations.sv: Du tänker för mycket på det där meddelandet.
translations.ro: Te gândești prea mult la acel mesaj.
translations.da: Du tænker alt for meget på den besked.
translations.ja: そのメッセージのことを考えすぎです。

tokens.explanation: 2nd-person pronoun (plural or polite singular); subject of 'pensez'.
Main verb, present indicative (2nd person plural/polite singular).
Adverb of degree modifying the verb phrase; indicates excess.
Preposition governed by 'penser' introducing its oblique complement.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies 'message'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'à' (object of thought).
